zh.lifeSummary: 當William Cockcroft Sr.於1605年出生在英國倫敦時，他的父親William Cockcroft15歲，母親Mary Wade16歲。他於1630年與Elizabeth Burnet在英國英格蘭倫敦結婚。他們至少是2個兒子和4個女兒的父母。他去世於1677年在布利提申 可隆尼亞爾 亞美利加維吉尼亞州諾福爾可享年72歲，埋葬在布利提申 可隆尼亞爾 亞美利加維吉尼亞州諾福爾可。

nameMeanings.name: Cockcroft
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English (Yorkshire and Lancashire): habitational name from a minor place of this name, for example Cockcroft in Rishworth or Cock Croft in Bingley, both in Yorkshire. They are named with Old English cocc ‘rooster’ + croft ‘paddock, smallholding’. In some cases it may be a topographic name with the same meaning.

variants.name: Cockroft
meanings: English (Yorkshire and Lancashire): variant of   Cockcroft  .

nameMeanings.name: William
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Probably the most successful of all the Old French names of Germanic origin that were introduced to England by the Normans. It is derived from Germanic wil ‘will, desire’ + helm ‘helmet, protection’. The fact that it was borne by the Conqueror himself does not seem to have inhibited its favour with the ‘conquered’ population: in the first century after the Conquest it was the commonest male name of all, and not only among the Normans. In the later Middle Ages it was overtaken by John , but continued to run second to that name until the 20th century, when the picture became more fragmented.

historicEvents.description: The Virginia Company founded the first permanent English colony at Jamestown in 1607. One of the original 13 states (it entered the Union in 1788). Virginia holds an important place in American history, as it was home to many of the founding fathers, including George Washington, Thomas Jefferson, James Madison, George Mason, and Patrick Henry. Four of Americas first five presidents were Virginians. During the Civil War, Richmond, Virginias capital, was the capital of the Confederacy. Today, Virginia is a popular tourist spot where people can visit historic places such as Alexandria, Williamsburg, and Mount Vernon, George Washingtons estate.

historicEvents.title: The Pilgrims Board the Mayflower
historicEvents.description: "The Pilgrims boarded the Mayflower in search of religious freedom in the New World in September 1620. The Mayflower set sail from Plymouth, England, with 102 passengers, 40 of whom called themselves ""Saints."" After two stormy months at sea, the ship reached the New World. Nearly half of the group died during their first winter due to malnutrition and the harsh New England winter."

historicEvents.title: The English Civil War
historicEvents.description: A series of conflicts regarding England's governance during the years 1642 to 1651 is now known as The English Civil War. Charles I summoned supporters to join him against his enemies in Parliament. In October 1642, nearly 10,000 men fought for Charles I and chased Parliament across the River Tamar. Fighting continued for years and was finally ended at the Battle of Worcester on September 3, 1651, with a Parliamentarian victory.

en.lifeSummary: When William Cockcroft Sr. was born in 1605, in London, England, his father, William Cockcroft, was 15 and his mother, Mary Wade, was 16. He married Elizabeth Burnet in 1630, in London, England, United Kingdom. They were the parents of at least 2 sons and 4 daughters. He died in 1677, in Norfolk, Virginia, British Colonial America, at the age of 72, and was buried in Norfolk, Virginia, British Colonial America.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque William Cockcroft Sr. est né en 1605, à Londres, Angleterre, son père, William Cockcroft, avait 15 ans et sa mère, Mary Wade, avait 16 ans. Il a épousé Elizabeth Burnet en 1630, à Londres, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni. Ils ont eu au moins 2 fils et 4 filles. Il est décédé en 1677, à Norfolk, Virginie, Amérique coloniale britannique, à l’âge de 72 ans, et a été enterré à Norfolk, Virginie, Amérique coloniale britannique.

de.lifeSummary: Als William Cockcroft Sr. 1605 in London, England geboren wurde, war sein Vater William Cockcroft 15 und seine Mutter Mary Wade 16. Er hat 1630 in London, England, United Kingdom Elizabeth Burnet geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 2 Söhne und 4 Töchter. Er starb 1677 im Alter von 72 Jahren in Norfolk, Virginia, British Colonial America und wurde in Norfolk, Virginia, British Colonial America begraben.

Он умер в 1677 г. в местности норфолк, Виргиния, бритиш колоняль амирика в возрасте 72 лет и был похоронен в местности норфолк, Виргиния, бритиш колоняль амирика.
